name: the Cantor's Knell
description: A great two-handed mace fashioned from a single fused knot of the Choir's own bone, its head a cluster of half-melted skulls cast around a hollow core so that every blow tolls like a struck bell in a stone nave. The note it sounds is the same low, unending chord the cathedral holds, and each impact drives that held breath into the wound as a shudder of pressure rather than any edge. It is heavy and slow to bring around, and it asks for a strong arm rather than a quick one, but where it lands it lands with the weight of an entire silenced choir behind it.
